caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario taking place in a hospital setting, likely during a training exercise called "Sim Week." A group of healthcare professionals, all wearing masks and scrubs, are gathered around a patient lying on a bed. The patient appears to be a mannequin used for training purposes, as indicated by the context and the controlled environment. One nurse is actively checking the patient's head, possibly assessing an injury or condition, while another holds a clipboard, likely documenting observations or instructions. The scene is well-lit, with medical equipment visible in the background, emphasizing the clinical nature of the exercise. The participants seem focused and engaged, suggesting a serious and educational atmosphere aimed at honing their medical skills.
